title: Method and system for ultrasonically determining homogeneity of material mixture in a volume
abstract: There is disclosed a method of determining homogeneity of a material mixture in a volume. The method comprises receiving a first signal, from a first acoustic transducer at a first spatial position of the volume, indicative of an acoustic wave transmitted through the material mixture at the first spatial position of the volume. The method further comprises receiving a second signal, from a second acoustic transducer at a second spatial position of the volume, indicative of an acoustic wave transmitted through the material mixture at the second spatial position of the volume. The method further comprises comparing the first and second signals to determine the homogeneity of the material mixture within the volume.
